nodes.name: Prinia
nodes.summary: Prinia（Prinia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联29种鸟类，如喜山山鹪莺、斑紋鷦鶯、Annam prinia等29种鸟类。

nodes.name: 斑紋鷦鶯
nodes.summary: 斑紋鷦鶯（Prinia striata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如斑紋鷦鶯。

nodes.name: 斑紋鷦鶯
nodes.summary: The striped prinia (Prinia striata) or Swinhoe's prinia is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It was formerly lumped with the Himalayan prinia (P. crinigera) as the striated prinia, but was split from it following a study published in 2019. It is distributed throughout mainland China and Taiwan. It is sympatric with P. crinigera in the Yunnan Province of China. There are three known subspecies: P. s. catharia which ranges from northeast India through Myanmar to south-central China. P. s. parumstriata, which is distributed throughout southeast and central China, and P. s. striata, which is restricted to Taiwan. References
